program
      var $X_start as real = 0
      var $Y_start as real = 0
      var $Z_print as real = 0
      var $Z_safe as real = $Z_print + 19.5000
      var $jog_speed as real = 5.0000
      var $print_speed as real = 1.5000
      var $dwell_start as real = 0.0800
      var $dwell_end as real = 0.0800

      G90
      G1 X $X_start Y $Y_start F 20
      G1 A $Z_safe F 10
      ProgramPause()
      print_network($jog_speed, $print_speed, $X_start, $Y_start, $Z_print, $Z_safe, $dwell_start, $dwell_end)
end

function print_network($jog_speed as real, $print_speed as real, $X_start as real, $Y_start as real, $Z_print as real, $Z_safe as real, $dwell_start as real, $dwell_end as real)
; Automation1 Aerotech program — direct travel between passes (no safe-Z bouncing)

VelocityBlendingOn()
CornerRoundingOn()

; Print Pass 0 
G1 X ($X_start+-1.6717) Y ($Y_start+-1.8167) A ($Z_print+-6.1228) F $jog_speed

G1 X ($X_start+0.3915) Y ($Y_start+2.2927) A ($Z_print+8.8772) F $print_speed
StopExtrusion($dwell_end)

; Print pass 188 
G1 X ($X_start+0.7428) Y ($Y_start+2.6876) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $jog_speed
StartExtrusion($dwell_start)
G1 X ($X_start+0.7428) Y ($Y_start+2.6876) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
G1 X ($X_start+0.7760) Y ($Y_start+2.7955) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
G1 X ($X_start+0.8453) Y ($Y_start+2.9307) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
G1 X ($X_start+0.9350) Y ($Y_start+3.0502) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
G1 X ($X_start+0.9599) Y ($Y_start+3.0746) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
G1 X ($X_start+0.9288) Y ($Y_start+3.0026) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
G1 X ($X_start+0.8488) Y ($Y_start+2.8518) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
G1 X ($X_start+0.7612) Y ($Y_start+2.7116) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
G1 X ($X_start+0.7428) Y ($Y_start+2.6876) A ($Z_print+9.0772) F $print_speed
StopExtrusion($dwell_end)

VelocityBlendingOff()
CornerRoundingOff()
G1 A $Z_safe F $jog_speed

end

function StartExtrusion($dwell_start as real)
      DriveBrakeOff(Aa)
      Dwell($dwell_start)
end

function StopExtrusion($dwell_end as real)
      DriveBrakeOn(Aa)
      Dwell($dwell_end)
end
